summary: Digital Asset raised $355M in an a16z‑led round at a $2B valuation, extending a Wall Street‑backed funding run as banks ramp up pilots on its Canton Network blockchain.

title: Hungary to reverse crypto trading crackdown after EU scrutiny
summary: Hungary’s government said it will unwind crypto trading restrictions that required approved validation for conversions and exposed users and service providers to criminal liability.

title: Stocks See Cautious Rise as Iran Risks Whipsaw Oil: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street traders paced a cautious rebound in stocks as technology giants climbed, though lingering worries about an escalation of the Middle East conflict whipsawed the oil market.

title: ECB Hikes for First Time Since 2023 as Inflation Heats Up
summary: The European Central Bank raised interest rates for the first time in almost three years, concluding it can no longer wait out the Iran war as inflation pressures intensify.
